title: PSK generation and storage (Keychain + DB)
description: Verify PSK management endpoints and storage behavior

steps.action: Verify PSK is 256 bits (64 hex characters)

steps.expected: Keychain contains the same PSK value
New PSK generated, different from previous, Keychain updated

steps.action: Check that auth token is auto-generated on first daemon start
steps.expected: kithkit.db config table has cowork-auth-token entry (64-char hex)
